name: Margarita Lecuona
abstract: Margarita Lecuona (1910–1981) was a Cuban singer and composer who is remembered for composing afro songs such as "Babalú" and "Tabú".

about_quotes.speaker: Frank "Machito" Grillo
about_quotes.evidence: with all the respect of (Ernesto) Lecuona ... Lecuona was a concert pianist ... he was top-ten in his time
